text.message: hey blue. can we make a deal so you leave me the 8 3:1

i need to pay more attention

thats rough man, why not steal from the one with all 5 ressources

if u said no, I'd take from you
unfortunate, sorry. we know green is leading tho
i have wood for u blue
i think you want me with army here over green
but will need some help, i am super behind
red can you do future ore to not plow u on 8 sheep?
great working together to stop green
i would have done the trade, just wanted to know what i get
you don't usually get to pick in these situations
kinda inclined to just block you for the rest of the game though

you help me or you doont
I think you should have taken the 369 in 3rd imo
but the rolls were also just insane
did not get the chance to gain momentum
looked like standard rolls to me
leaving green coord 9 ore wheat is really good for them
yeah i did not spot the coordination to be fair
